workflow.name: KDBP Evolve Behavior
workflow.critical: The workflow execution engine is governed by: {project-root}/_kdbp/core/workflow.xml
You MUST have already loaded and processed: {installed_path}/workflow.yaml
Communicate all responses in {communication_language} tailored to {user_skill_level}
EVOLUTION ENGINE — classify root cause BEFORE proposing any fix
Type F pre-screen: if output was correct but wrong problem solved, STOP and load cold tier
The Roast (Step 05): use DIFFERENT agent if possible. Human reviews for pulled punches.

step.goal: Load behavior into cold tier for evolution
step.action: Load, read completely, and execute steps/step-00-behavior-load.md

step.goal: Identify the symptom — expected vs actual
step.action: Load, read completely, and execute steps/step-01-symptom.md

step.goal: Locate failure in workflow via linkage map
step.action: Load, read completely, and execute steps/step-02-locate.md

step.goal: Classify root cause A through F
step.action: Load, read completely, and execute steps/step-03-classify.md
Load, read completely, and execute steps/step-04-fix.md
Load, read completely, and execute steps/step-05-roast.md
Load, read completely, and execute steps/step-06-version.md
